seoTitle: Yarragundry vs Yarramalong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yarragundry and Yarramalong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarragundry and Yarramalong.
heading: Yarragundry vs Yarramalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarragundry, New South Wales and Yarramalong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarramalong has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Yarragundry (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarragundry or Yarramalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarragundry has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Yarramalong scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarragundry scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Yarramalong scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarragundry or Yarramalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarramalong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
